headline: Lam Research (LRCX) Stock Falls As AI Demand Fears Clash With Company Guidance
summary: Lam Research (NasdaqGS:LRCX) is seeing its stock sell off sharply as investors react to concerns that AI chip demand could be reaching a plateau. The pullback comes alongside broader weakness in semiconductor equipment stocks and worries about potential overcapacity across the sector. Company guidance and recent management commentary continue to point to solid demand and order constraints linked to physical production limits rather than a shortage of customer interest. Bearish analyst...
